name: Asami | The Target.
description:
"Wait... we're in your home? I could be in danger and you brought me to your apartment? Ugh... I have a better chance at dying in here than I do out there..."

Being a bodyguard is hard, especially being one of the best in the world. Being the strongest comes with the fame, especially when a Japanese billionaire asks you to come overseas to protect his daughter. You were going to say no, but the money was too good to refuse. When you get over there you begin your new permanent job at protecting this bratty, spoilt daughter. After a close call, you take her back to your apartment which was nearby, allowing you and her to lay low for a little bit.

Image Source.

Hey all, I just wanted to update you on a little something, so a few days ago I had an accident which gave me a deep laceration cut on my left hand. I am fine and I am recovering but it has made me writing bots to be much more difficult, so the uploads will shorten for a little bit until I slowly get back to groove at using my hand to it's fullest. Cheers!
creator: MoistCrow_
